top_signals.title: U.S. Awards $2 Billion to Nine Quantum Computing Companies
top_signals.summary: IBM and small-cap quantum names, including IonQ, D-Wave Quantum, Rigetti Computing, Infleqtion, and other peers, are surging in New York premarket trading after a Wall Street Journal report said the Trump administration is preparing to award $2 billion in CHIPS Act grants to nine quantum-computing companies. IBM is set to receive half of the $2 billion tranche, or about $1 billion, as the large-cap leader in the race to build quantum computing systems that could revolutionize national security, accelerate scientific discovery, and deliver a range…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Turkey court removes leader of opposition as Erdoğan tightens grip
top_signals.summary: Turkish stocks fall 6% on move that could hobble the long-serving president’s most important rivals

top_signals.title: CLEAR token tanks 48% as Everclear winds down protocol, foundation and labs unit
top_signals.summary: Everclear achieved $500 million in monthly volume, but "never developed the commercial depth," the team said on Thursday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
